# 🤖 Mazara VCOM Automation - LLM Context

> [!NOTE]
> This file is a machine-readable summary of the project for LLMs (like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini).

## 🧭 Project Purpose
A real-time SCADA monitoring and forensic analysis pipeline for the Mazara 01 PV solar plant. It automates VCOM data extraction, performs anomaly detection, and provides a local AI-powered analysis interface.

## 🛠️ Tech Stack
- **Backend:** Python 3.10+, FastAPI
- **Automation:** Playwright (Chromium)
- **Intelligence:** Qwen 2.5 7B (Remote via Ollama @ 192.168.10.126)
- **Frontend:** Vanilla JS, CSS3 (Dark Mode, WebSocket-driven)
- **Messaging:** Telegram Bot API

## 📂 Core Architecture
- `run_monitor.py`: Main orchestrator.
- `vcom_monitor.py`: Scraper (15m cycle).
- `processor_watchdog_final.py`: Forensic analysis & health status generator.
- `llm_agent.py`: Local AI sandbox for complex queries.
- `telegram_bot.py`: Alerting and mobile command interface.
- `dashboard/`: FastAPI web application.

## 📊 Data Schema (for AI reasoning)
- **Macro Health:** Global plant status (Online, Tripped, Comms).
- **Inverter Health:** Per-inverter metrics using keys:
  - `ac_v`: Power (Watts)
  - `temp_v`: Temperature (°C)
  - `pr_v`: Performance Ratio (%)
  - `dc_v`: Current (Amperes)
- **CSV Naming:** `extracted_data/{Metric}_{YYYY-MM-DD}.csv`
- **CSV Columns:** Pattern `Metric MPPT X (INV TX#-##) [Unit]`

## 🌍 Plant Topology (Hardcoded)
- **System ID:** 2144635
- **Configuration:** 3 Transformers (TX1, TX2, TX3), 12 inverters each.
- **Inverter IDs:** `INV TX1-01` through `INV TX3-12`.
- **Location:** Mazara del Vallo, Italy.

## ⚙️ Thresholds
- **PR:** Green >= 85%
- **Temp:** Warning > 40°C, Critical > 45°C
- **Downtime:** Minimum 9 minutes window for alerts.
